Software & datasets

Water, landscapes, and time

Hydrology and Landscape Dynamics Lab — Temple University

We study how water moves through and shapes Earth’s critical zone — from the bottom of the groundwater to the top of the canopy. Using theory, models, and field data, we trace the hydrological impacts of climate and landscape change on both geologic and human timescales.

Groundwater and landscape evolution

Groundwater, slope creep, and failure

Groundwater and landscape hydrology
